accountBoundaryNote: Keyword discovery and API-key management stay in Mdtero Account. Use the agent install for parse, translate, task-status, and download workflows.

targets.label: OpenClaw
targets.description: Direct install inside OpenClaw with one prepared command.
targets.descriptionZh: 适合直接在 OpenClaw 里用现成命令完成安装。

targets.label: Claude Code

targets.descriptionZh: 适合把 Mdtero 放进 .claude/skills 的 Claude Code 工作区。

targets.label: Gemini CLI

targets.descriptionZh: 适合把工作流写进 GEMINI.md 的 Gemini CLI 环境。
